hero.title: Kopa porojeke ya go fitlhelela
hero.lead: IATF e sekaseka dikopo tsa diporojeke tsa go fitlhelela batho tse di simololang ka tlhokego ya mmatota.
support: Ga go tlhokege gore o tlhalose ka botlalo gore bothata jono bo ama mang le gore ke ka ntlha yang fa bo le botlhokwa.

actions.label: Dirisa Discord mo boemong jwa yone

intro: Ditsela tsotlhe di tlhatlhobiwa ka tsela e e tshwanang.

items.label: Webosaete
items.body: Dirisa foromo e e fa tlase fano go romela kopo e e rulagantsweng.

items.label: E-mail ya gago
items.body: Romela kopo ka tlhamalalo go {{contact.requestsEmail}}Dikopo tsa imeile di ka nna tsa nna direkoto tsa kopo ya setšhaba morago ga go sekasekwa le go phimolwa.

items.label: Go sa utlwane
items.body: Simolola foo fa e le gore seo se motlhofo. Kopo e santse e fetela mo go tlhatlhobeng go go tshwanang.

guidance.title: Pele o romela kopo
paragraphs: Dikopo di ka sobokanngwa le go phasaladiwa jaaka direkoto tsa dikopo tsa setšhaba mo mokgatlhong wa IATF GitHub, mo webosaeteng e, kgotsa ka bobedi.

O se ka wa tsenya diaterese tsa gago, dinomoro tsa founo, dintlha tsa kalafi kgotsa tshedimosetso e e ka go thusang go bona gore motho ke mang fa e se fela fa go tlhokega e bile o dumela gore IATF e e sekaseke.
IATF e tlosa dintlha tse di sa tlhokegeng tsa go ikgolaganya le batho pele ga e gatisa direkoto tsa dikopo.

review.title: Ditsholofelo tsa go boeletsa
paragraphs: Go romela kopo ga go tlhomamise gore kopo e tla amogelwa.
IATF e sekaseka dikopo tsa gore a tiro eo e a tshwanela, a e ka kgona go dirwa, e mosola, le gore a e tshwanetse go tsenngwa mo bobolokelong jwa batho botlhe.
Dikopo dingwe di ka nna tsa ganwa, tsa busediwa morago kgotsa tsa fetolwa pele di ka amogelwa.

fields.name: mokopi
fields.label: Leina la gago kgotsa mokgatlho wa gago
fields.helper: Ke mang yo o dirang kopo eno?

fields.name: tsela ya go ikgolaganya
fields.label: Tsela e e tlhophilweng ya go ikgolaganya

fields.name: dintlha tsa go ikgolaganya
fields.label: Dintlha tsa go ikgolaganya le bone
fields.helper: Aterese ya imeili kgotsa nomoro ya Discord ya go ikgolaganya le ba bangwe.
fields.placeholder: Aterese ya imeili kgotsa Discord handle

fields.name: puo
fields.label: Puo e e buiwang
fields.helper: Puo e o e ratang, fa go tlhokega.

fields.name: bothata
fields.label: O leka go rarabolola bothata bofe?
fields.helper: Tlhalosa sekgoreletsi seno ka mafoko a a motlhofo.

fields.name: badirisi ba ba amegang
fields.label: Ke bomang ba ba amegang?
fields.helper: Seno se ne se ka thusa mang?

fields.name: extraMalebana le kgang e go buiwang ka yone
fields.label: Dintlha tse dingwe
fields.helper: Abelana sengwe le sengwe se se ka thusang go tlhalosa se se tlhokegang: lebaka la go bo go le botlhokwa, dikai, ditshupiso, mogopolo o o sa tlhamalalang wa software, kgotsa go lekanyetsa nako.

fields.name: openSourceConsent [Motswedi wa Tumalano]
fields.label: A o ikutlwa o phuthologile fa o dirisa didirisiwa tsa batho botlhe?
fields.helper: Diporojeke tse di amogetsweng ke di-repository tsa setšhaba tsa IATF.

header.kicker: Fa e le gore e amogetswe
header.title: Se go amogelwa go se kayang

items: polokelo ya setšhaba mo mokgatlhong wa IATF GitHub
moenjenere yo o ikarabelelang yo o abetsweng porojeke
laesense ya copyleft ya khoutu le didiriswa tsa porojeke
rekoto ya boikwadiso mo lefelong la IATF

header.title: Kopo e khutshwane e e utlwalang sentle e lekane go simolola

paragraphs: Fa e le gore tota o na le sengwe se o se tlhokang malebana le go fitlhelela dilo mme o akanya gore se tshwanetse go nna porojeke ya setšhaba, re romelele.
